nasb.text: In the fear of the Lord there is strong confidence, And his children will have refuge.

esv.text: In the fear of the Lord one has strong confidence, and his children will have a refuge.

cnv.text: 敬畏耶和華的，大有倚靠； 他的子孫也有避難所。

ccb.text: 敬畏耶和华的信心坚定， 他的子孙也有庇护所。

csbs.text: 因着敬畏耶和华，人有坚固的依赖； 他的儿女也有避难所。
